title: Visual Style for Pizzonia’s Personal Study Project (PPSP)
text:
Load Packages

library(brandr)
library(dplyr)
library(geobr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggspatial)
library(here)
library(htmltools)
library(palmerpenguins)
library(sf)
library(tidyr)

title: Visual Style for Pizzonia’s Personal Study Project (PPSP)
text:
Comparison
Static
One Variable: Single Bar Chart
Two Variables: Viariable Widht Column Chart
Three or More Variables
Few Items: Multiple Bar Charts
Many Items: Table With Embedded Charts
Changing Over Time
Many Periods
Cyclical Data: Circular Area Chart
Noncyclical Data: Line Chart
Few Periods
Single or Few Items: Column Chart
Many Items: Line Chart

title: Visual Style for Pizzonia’s Personal Study Project (PPSP)
text:
Distribution
Single Variable
Few Items: Column Histogram
Many Items: Line Histogram
Two Variables: Scatter Chart
Three Variables: 3D Area Chart

title: Visual Style for Pizzonia’s Personal Study Project (PPSP)
text:
Composition
Changin Over Time
Few Periods
Only Relative Differences Matter: Stacked 100% Column Chart
Relative and Absolute Differences Matter: Stacked Column Chart
Many Periods
Only Relative Differences Matter: Stacked 100% Area Chart
Relative and Absolute Differences Matter: Stacked Area Chart
Static
Simple Share of Total: Pie Chart
Accumulation or Subtraction to Total: Waterfall Chart
Components of Components: Stacked 100% Column Chart With Subcomponents

title: Visual Style for Pizzonia’s Personal Study Project (PPSP)
text:
Relationship
Two Variables: Scatter Chart
Three Variables: Bubble Chart

title: Visual Style for Pizzonia’s Personal Study Project (PPSP)
text:
Distribution
Discrete: Dot Map
1 dot = 1 unit
Continuous: Heatmap
Color = Density

title: Visual Style for Pizzonia’s Personal Study Project (PPSP)
text:
Quantity
By Region: Choropleth
Color = Intenisty
By Point: Proportional Symbol
Size = Value

title: Visual Style for Pizzonia’s Personal Study Project (PPSP)
text:
Location
Simple: Marker Map
Pin = 1 Place
Categorical: Categorical Icons
1 icon = category

title: Visual Style for Pizzonia’s Personal Study Project (PPSP)
text:
Flow
Origin to Destination: Flow Map
Width = Volume
Continuous: Route Track
GPS/Rout Path

title: Visual Style for Pizzonia’s Personal Study Project (PPSP)
text:
Comparsion
Distortion: Cartogram
Propotional area to the value
Keep Shape: Isochrone
Time Rings

title: Visual Style for Pizzonia’s Personal Study Project (PPSP)
text:
Special Cases & Combinations
Multiple Variables: Bivariant Map or Combined Map
Terrain/Relief: Hillshade/Contour/3D
Network/Connection: Geospatial Map (node-link map)
Temporal Data: Animated Map

title: Visual Style for Pizzonia’s Personal Study Project (PPSP)
